data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider review and flagging of responses'. However, while the linked use case mentions that the provider reviews submissions and flags them for extra time allocation, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this functionality in the API or system. The lack of specific API reads or persisted state checks to validate this requirement leads to a gap in the evidence supporting its satisfaction.
gaps: No concrete evidence confirming the implementation of provider review and flagging of responses in the API.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for provider review functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the provider can review and flag responses through the API.
